reject_reason: Leading magic ≠ "KAHN" (§10.1: readers MUST reject on magic mismatch).

description: Version byte is 0x02; only 0x01 is defined for this version of the spec.
reject_reason: Unsupported version (§10.1: readers MUST reject unsupported version).

description: Flags byte is 0x01; reserved and MUST be 0x00.
reject_reason: flags ≠ 0 (§10.1: any flag bit set MUST be rejected).

description: Body holds a Null at offset 6, but root_offset = 5 points into the header (flags byte).
File size is 19 (one Null body byte). root_offset = 7 points into the trailer; max valid is file_size − 13 = 6.
Object leaf with two pairs whose keys are 'b' (deref 0x06) then 'a' (deref 0x08). Bytes are well-formed but the keys are not strictly UTF-8-sorted.
reject_reason: Object leaf keys are not strictly UTF-8-sorted: deref(key_off[0])="b" > deref(key_off[1])="a" (§7.3, §8).

description: Object leaf with two pairs whose key offsets both deref to "a".
reject_reason: Duplicate key in a leaf — keys MUST be strictly sorted and unique (§7.3, §8).

description: Body byte 0x35 is in the reserved gap 0x35..0x3F.
reject_reason: Unknown / reserved type code in traversal (§4: reserved gaps MUST NOT appear; readers MUST reject).

description: Array internal node with m=1 wrapping a single child leaf. Single-node containers MUST be stored as a leaf, not wrapped (§8 invariant 3).
reject_reason: Internal node with m < 2 (§8 invariant 3; §11.1 lists this as MUST reject).

description: Generic String length prefix is 11 bytes long (10 continuation bytes + 0x00). The varuint encodes value 0 but uses more than the 10-byte maximum.
reject_reason: Overlong varuint — exceeds the 10-byte maximum (§6: decoders MUST reject overlong varuints).

description: Body byte 0x48 falls in the reserved gap 0x48..0x4F (between Int64 and Float32).
reject_reason: Unknown / reserved type code in gap 0x48..0x4F (§4: reserved gaps MUST NOT appear; readers MUST reject).

description: Body byte 0x52 falls in the reserved gap 0x52..0x5F (between Float64 and TinyString).
reject_reason: Unknown / reserved type code in gap 0x52..0x5F (§4).

description: Body byte 0x88 falls in the reserved gap 0x88..0xBF (between object-internal and Extension).
reject_reason: Unknown / reserved type code in gap 0x88..0xBF (§4).

description: Array leaf at @06 has off[0] = 5, which lands on the flags byte inside the header. §8 invariant 7 requires offsets ≥ 6.
reject_reason: Container offset < 6 (§8 invariant 7; §11.1: 'offset not strictly earlier than its node, in the header, or on a non-type-code byte').

description: Array leaf at @07 has off[0] = 0x0A, which equals or exceeds the leaf's own position (0x07). §8 invariant 7 requires offsets strictly less than the carrying node's position.
reject_reason: Container offset not strictly less than the carrying node's position — postorder forbids forward references (§8 invariant 7).

description: Array leaf at @09 has off[0] = 0x07, which lands on the second byte of an earlier UInt16 payload. The dereferenced byte 0x88 is not a valid type-code byte (it falls in reserved gap 0x88..0xBF). Demonstrates that readers MUST validate the tag at every dereferenced offset, not only at the root. Note: the spec's only mechanism for detecting a mid-payload offset is the type-code check at the dereferenced byte (§4, §8 invariant 7); a mid-payload offset that happens to land on a defined tag is undetectable and out of scope.
reject_reason: Dereferenced byte 0x88 is in reserved gap 0x88..0xBF — §8 invariant 7 requires every offset to land on a valid type-code byte; §11.1 marks unknown type codes during traversal as MUST reject.
